description: Business letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Connected to both the India trade and trade in the Maghrib. Mentions: lac, clove, nutmeg, civet, pepper; someone meeting with the sender in Raʾs Tīnī; an Aleppan; a Byzantine ship that brought Jews from al-Mahdiyya including Ibn Nufayʿ (Abū ʿImrān known from the India Book?) and [...] b. Nahray; quotes a couple biblical verses; the news from the Jews who arrived that Yaʿaqov b. Isḥāq was killed, and something to do with Tilimsān and Fez; (then in the postscript,) someone who has been idle or unemployed; ʿAydhāb; and Alexandria after the holidays. (The writer is Abu Nasr b. Ibrahim, a well-known India trader, who was a close friend of both Abu Zikri and Halfon b. Nethanel. He use to enf his letters with a Qoranic verse: וחסבי אללה ונעם אלוכיל sura 3, 173. AA)
tags: ib-addenda, hinge, India Book unedited, to edit, IB6
mentioned: Alexandria, Fez, Raʾs Tīnī, Tilimsān, al-Mahdiyya, ʿAydhāb
description_he: מכתב עסקי ביהודית-ערבית. קשור לסחר עם הודו ולסחר במגרב. מוזכרים: לכה, ציפורן, אגוז מוסקט, ציבט, פלפל; מפגש בראס טיני; איש מחלב; ספינה ביזנטית שהביאה יהודים מאל-מהדיה כולל אבן נופיע ו[...] ב. נהריי; ציטוטי מקרא; ידיעות על רצח יעקב ב. יצחק; ענייני תלמסאן ופס.
